title: More Curios Totems of Undying
description: This mod makes it so More Totems of Undying are Curios Compatible!
body:
<center>

This mod is simply a bridge between [More Totems of Undying](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-totems-of-undying) for 1.16 to [Curios API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios-fabric) so you can use the totems from a curios slot.

</center>
